name: Greater Mark of Passage
description: You increase an ability score of your choice by 1. Your Intuitive Motion die increases from a d4 to a d6. When you use your Magical Passage feature to cast Misty Step, you can choose up to two willing creatures within 30 feet; each can use their reaction to teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space they can see.

mechanics.description: Up to two willing creatures within 30 feet can use a reaction to teleport 30 feet.
